calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court acknowledges counsel's absence and takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Yang. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Chan, via Zoom, for Raymond and Jenny Chan, Co-Executors.

The court confirms with counsel that the co-Executors have made unauthorized distributions and that this is an ancillary probate. The court reminds counsel of this court's procedure of not making distributions without court approval. The court advises counsel that it had considered requiring the co-Executors to begin the process of collecting and returning the distributed assets but instead, will be ordering counsel to file a petition to formally allow the distributions and advises counsel as to its reasons why. Counsel requests a 60-day continuance to prepare and file the petition.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated February 5, 2010 is admitted to probate. Raymond Chan and Jenny Chan are appointed the Co-Executors of the estate of Siu Ying Chan Ho with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on May 2, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Deputy: K. Kabasares; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
